summary: Tested BMIA Compliance Bulk Upload feature (backend regression + new UI). Backend: 7/7 pytest cases pass — stats, research validation, bulk-upload list, invalid source, non-zip rejection, 404 on unknown job, and full E2E create→poll→done flow. Frontend: verified login, /compliance loads, `Bulk upload archive` button visible below `Force sync now`, modal opens with source selector (NSE/BSE/SEBI), file dropzone, upload submit btn, recent jobs list. E2E: generated a 987-byte ZIP with 2 minimal PDFs, uploaded it, verified POST returned job_id with status=queued, job appeared in Recent jobs list, polled until status=done (< 3s for small payload). Non-zip file properly triggered toast error `Please select a .zip archive of PDFs`. Refresh button and close button both work. No blocking issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: ComplianceBulkUploadModal.js (340 lines) is fine for size; no duplication; uses env vars properly; data-testid coverage complete.

Auth note: GET/POST /api/compliance/bulk-upload endpoints are NOT protected by JWT — any anonymous client can enumerate jobs or upload a ZIP. If compliance data is sensitive, consider adding the same JWT guard used elsewhere in the app. Not blocking for MVP preview.

Backend: _run_bulk_job uses synchronous pymongo in a background thread (correct, since the worker must not share the FastAPI motor loop). _rebuild_store at end is blocking (5-15s) — acceptable given single-job queue semantics.
Frontend: polling interval 3s only runs while `activeJobId` is set; once modal closes, the interval is cleared — no leak. Good.

Minor: when user closes modal during an active poll (before status becomes done), the success toast for that job will never fire because pollRef is cleared on unmount. Jobs still finish on backend; just no inline success toast. Low priority.
test_credentials: somnath.dey@smifs.com / admin123 (JWT). Token stored in localStorage under `bmia_session_token` (and also `bmia_token` for safety).
seed_data_creation: Created 3 bulk-upload jobs in compliance_bulkload_jobs collection during testing, all status=done on source=sebi (test_bulk.zip + ui_test_bulk.zip + bulk_test.zip, 2 PDFs each, minimal synthetic PDFs).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk upload feature is fully functional end-to-end. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_compliance_bulk_upload.py is reusable (generates its own minimal valid PDFs + ZIPs, no external deps). If you need to re-test, run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_compliance_bulk_upload.py -v. Frontend modal has complete data-testid coverage: open-bulk-upload-btn, bulk-upload-modal, bulk-source-{nse|bse|sebi}, bulk-file-input, bulk-upload-submit-btn, bulk-refresh-jobs-btn, bulk-upload-close-btn, bulk-jobs-list, bulk-job-<job_id>.
